narrative:
Biglick Twp township has 934 registered voters, with 44.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.0 percentage points.
